commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content: That is, “Who feeds and delights in my soul, which is His garden, among the lilies of my virtues, perfections, and graces.” (St. John of the Cross)

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Beloved. She speaks thus, when she finds him, and runs to his embraces, having found what trouble her neglect had occasioned. (Calmet)
